chapter_title: Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
text:
In this subchapter, “electric personal assistive mobility device” means a two non-tandem wheeled device designed for transporting one person that is:

(1) self-balancing; and

(2) propelled by an electric propulsion system with an average power of 750 watts or one horsepower.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 551. Operation of Bicycles & Mopeds, Golf Carts, and Other Low-powered Vehicles
##### § 551.201 — Definition

In this subchapter, “electric personal assistive mobility device” means a two non-tandem wheeled device designed for transporting one person that is:

    (1) self-balancing; and

    (2) propelled by an electric propulsion system with an average power of 750 watts or one horsepower.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1318, Sec. 5, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “electric personal assistive mobility device” means a two non-tandem wheeled device designed for transporting one person that is:
propelled by an electric propulsion system with an average power of 750 watts or one horsepower.
